headline: UBS Maintains Buy on Invitation Homes, Raises Price Target to $35
summary: UBS  analyst Michael Goldsmith   maintains Invitation Homes (NYSE:INVH) with a Buy and raises the price target from $32 to $35.

raw.headline: UBS Maintains Buy on Invitation Homes, Raises Price Target to $35
